module: Module 1: Information Theory and Source Coding
topics: Entropy: Properties of Entropy, Joint and Conditional Entropy, Mutual Information

module: Module 4: Wireless Channels and Receiver Techniques
topics: Path Loss and Shadowing: Free Space Path Loss and Two-Ray Model
